title: Gender and International Security: Research & Analysis | CSIS
text:
Gender and International Security

CSIS researchers use gender as a lens to better understand international relations and national security challenges and discern ways through which the national security, foreign policy, and business communities can better advance gender equity in their decisionmaking structures.

Image

Photo: AFP/Getty Images

A Conversation with WTO Director General Dr. Ngozi Okonjo-Iweala | The Futures Summit

WTO Director General Dr. Ngozi Okonjo-Iweala joined the CSIS Futures Summit to discuss how the WTO can navigate geopolitical shocks and spearhead mindset shifts to ensure inclusivity.

Redefining Roles: How Russia’s War is Transforming Ukrainian Women’s Place in Society

Russia’s ongoing war presents an opportunity to advance women’s position in Ukraine toward European standards and the goal of EU accession, as women take on responsibilities in support of the war effort that challenge traditional expectations and societal norms.
